intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/4. 10:00 at 78%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 10:00 at 78%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 78% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/4. 10:00 at 78%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 10:00 at 78%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/4. 10:00 at 82%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 82% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 20 minutes of work done. 40 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/4. 82% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/4. 82% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 3/4. 42% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 3. 20min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 86%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 3/4. 30 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 3/4. 86% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 90% for 10:00. Then 20min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 90% × 10:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 10:00. Then 20min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 90% × 10:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 71% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 71% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 40min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
